description: Letter from [...] b. Ghālib to the teacher Yiṣḥaq b. Yosef ha-Sefaradi, "may he slaughter his enemies". Only the address and a fairly formulaic opening are preserved ('all that delayed (wakhkhara) my letters to you was fate and its calamities').
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
